ddls:
CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that filed the report */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter for which the filing was made */,
  "holdings" INTEGER /* Number of holdings reported in the filing */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Total value of the holdings in thousands of dollars */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of form filed (e.g., 13F-HR) */,
  "date_filed" TEXT /* Date when the filing was submitted */,
  "filing_number" TEXT /* Unique filing number assigned by the regulatory body */,
  "amendment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the filing is an amendment */,
  "amended_filing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original filing if this is an amendment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the filing (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_amended_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("amended_filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("quarter") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_form_type FOREIGN KEY ("form_type") REFERENCES form_types ("form_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Q1 2022) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the quarter */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Quarter number (1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_types" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form type */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form type (e.g., 13F-HR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the form type */,
  "filing_frequency" TEXT /* How often the form is filed (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the holding is part of */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset held */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the asset in thousands of dollars */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date when the asset was acquired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the holding was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the holding data (e.g., manual entry, automated feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Stock, Bond) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the asset operates */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds or other fixed-income assets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, compliance officer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the filing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the filing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_history" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation entry */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding being valued */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation was recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the holding in thousands of dollars */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation (e.g., market price, model-based) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the valuation data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuation_history_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing being checked */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken as a result of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_officer" TEXT /* Name of the compliance officer who performed the check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)
